svg.title: MediCore AI — Multi-Agent Healthcare Platform Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing orchestrator, 8 specialized agents, integrations, and data layer

g.text: Patient portal · Doctor dashboard · Admin panel · WhatsApp / SMS gateway
Routes intent · Manages state · Coordinates multi-agent chains

g.text: Google Calendar API · Twilio SMS/WhatsApp · EHR (FHIR) · Stripe · Sendgrid · Pinecone
